sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15309" key="a)rneoqoi/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρνεοθοίνης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15309.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feasting on rams,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.235</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollonid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
